category_sources: Official GitHub repository at https://github.com/tjko/jpeginfo describes jpeginfo as printing information and testing JPEG/JFIF integrity.
source_facts.description says 'Prints information and tests integrity of JPEG/JFIF files'.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use 'jpeginfo' at https://github.com/tjko/jpeginfo.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains requirements, installation, and history.
Official project page is linked from the repository as the latest-version/homepage surface.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README links the maintainer's project page as the latest-version source.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official GitHub repository https://github.com/tjko/jpeginfo.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents CSV/JSON output and digest-related features in jpeginfo history.
